Hey -- I wanted to fill you in on why we keep asking you for donations.

Campaign staff are going into some major budget conversations next week, and those conversations will be grounded in our fundraising numbers: how much we raised last quarter and how much we expect to raise before Election Day.

Thanks to generous donations from supporters like you, we have more money to allocate to TV ads, organizing projects and get out the vote efforts. All of that makes a real difference on campaigns like this, and every single donation, no matter the size, puts Bob in a better position going into November.

Next week, we're going to plan based on the assumption that online donors will give a total of $9,000-$10,000 per day -- at minimum -- for the rest of the campaign. That's the base amount we need to get Bob's message out to every single voter. If we want to turn Pennsylvania blue again in 2018, we need to mobilize Democrats who don't usually vote in the midterms, get every 18-year-old registered to vote and reach folks who the Trump administration has left behind.

**With that in mind, before the end of the day, can you make a donation of $5 or more today? Today marks the halfway point of the month, so my team really needs to reach 50 percent of our monthly grassroots fundraising goal by tonight at midnight --_but right now, we 're sitting at just 43 percent._ **I was recently named the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the House, friend, so we need to hit each and every fundraising goal until November to win this race.** **[Can you make a donation today to help me get back on track to meet our goal for July?](http://action.tomohalleran. I'm so proud to represent Arizona families in Congress, friend, and with [**your support**](http://action.tomohalleran. Tom

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: What we stand for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXkdhVbbaQrNaI-hwGXeLO1epmIXpYSQDOaEW4kDYwU=/Sf2KFHYdgEZi7y3LKaxngaTpAgSgO6CBNDK9egjPOqg=) Friends and Neighbors -- Out on the campaign trail, I am often asked: "Why did you decide to get into the race to become Florida's next Chief Financial Officer (CFO)?" There were many reasons - **I want to bring an innovation centered economy to Florida. I want your hard earned tax dollars to be spent in the way you have been promised, repeatedly, that they would be. I want to act as a key check on the Governor 's mansion, the Legislature - and Washington, to include Congress and yes, the White House.** But while it is of course vitally important that we stand against Trump's shortsighted and destructive policies, it's equally essential that we talk about what we stand for:
* We have to stop giving our message away. _We_ are, in fact, the party of personal liberties, the constitution and patriotism.

* I believe that Democrats are the party of innovation and inspiration.

* We believe that being pro-business means investing in entrepreneurs and small business, not giving tax breaks to large companies who don't need them so that they can bring low-wage jobs to the state.

* We believe that the right to vote is a civil liberty guaranteed by the constitution - unlike Rick Scott and others who believe in using a clemency committee to engage in voter suppression.

[Help Jeremy get to the cabinet. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXkdhVbbaQrNaI-hwGXeLO1epmIXpYSQDOaEW4kDYwU=/smvGjq9qi8cE66bHmobEuQcRtpXThXkflOPESVkXjpc=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) This year, voters will be making their voices heard: on what they no longer want to see in government - **but also, and more importantly, where they want us to go from here.** As your next CFO, I will work tirelessly every day to help build an innovative, prosperous Florida, with policies and practices that work for every day Floridians, while standing for values and principles we can be proud of and for a forward thinking vision for our great state's future. But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't get there without your help.** **[Can you contribute $20.18 today, to help me bring our vision to the cabinet and to help move Florida forward?](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXkdhVbbaQrNaI-hwGXeLO1epmIXpYSQDOaEW4kDYwU=/smvGjq9qi8cE66bHmobEuQcRtpXThXkflOPESVkXjpc=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)**** ** Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: The White House
subject: American leadership takes center stage
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbaf402b9a14118f810c10f92972407893b131a665cc010975acc3de12f0253c19dfff2f1a97ba9167b4ccf716f7074236ae3ae59d27a661) The White House • July 16, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump is holding a joint press conference with President Vladimir Putin of Russia in Helsinki, Finland. [Watch live. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbaf402b9a14118f9f981ce0fafaa9f8917376e9b9a980bfc806307053bb1f227e62726d61a94e23072fd26a5f0bdca709b635e46bb9a066) |
---
|

## American leadership takes center stage
**As President Trump meets with Russian President Putin today** , he does so with America’s role as a tough world leader more secure than it has been in years.
**At last week’s NATO summit** , President Trump made clear that our allies must honor their financial obligations--a move that will both strengthen the transatlantic Alliance and look out for American taxpayers at home. “I am pleased to report that we have received substantial commitments from members to increase their defense spending and to do so in a much more timely manner,” the President said after the summit. Ahead of his meeting with President Putin this morning, President Trump tweeted that “NATO is now strong & rich!”
**The special bond between America and Great Britain** was on full display during President Trump’s trip to the United Kingdom. “The United Kingdom and the United States are bound together by a common historic heritage, language, and heroes,” President Trump said, standing alongside British Prime Minister Theresa May. “The traditions of freedom, sovereignty, and the true rule of law were our shared gift to the world.”
[Watch President Trump’s press conference with President Putin.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbaf402b9a14118f9f981ce0fafaa9f8917376e9b9a980bfc806307053bb1f227e62726d61a94e23072fd26a5f0bdca709b635e46bb9a066)
**Watch** : [The President and First Lady visit the United Kingdom. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbaf402b9a14118fdb97e1647d501b63d86e7a320283895e082229b333f44ceaa4b802efcee5c9188983b1608c48c4ad30813333e26fede9)

---
|

## Broad support for Judge Kavanaugh pours in
**Last week, President Trump nominated Judge Brett Kavanaugh** to succeed Justice Anthony Kennedy on the U.S. Supreme Court. The diverse and widespread support that has poured in for Judge Kavanaugh since shows that President Trump made the right choice.
**Eighteen of Judge Kavanaugh’s female law clerks** , 26 state Attorneys General, and more than 160 members of the Yale University community have signed letters praising his unsurpassed qualifications for a seat on the Court. “In our view, the Judge has been one of the strongest advocates in the federal judiciary for women lawyers,” his former clerks wrote. “I look for the best,” Judge Kavanaugh said at the White House last week. “We are proud that so many of those hires have been talented women.”
**The letter from a majority** of our Nation’s state Attorneys General sums up the case for Judge Kavanaugh clearly and concisely: “Throughout his career, Judge Kavanaugh has demonstrated an abiding commitment to the principles and freedoms on which our country was founded, and an unshakable respect for the proper role of the courts within our constitutional structure.”
[In their words: Support for Judge Kavanaugh’s nomination pours in.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbaf402b9a14118f14a96a37be182eb33f5ae791e97297e3f34c426d2def0ba87e0bf91deca1953534044e3600eeed2d49a0c76fa772c592)
**More** : [Get to know President Trump’s nominee for the High Court ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbaf402b9a14118ff09d3fb97d0448fabb1c777c34a370ed726b2bb9cdc4e7faefa72b7b08fa3df30d960b6c3936aea3ce85053b3a94cc09)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump with President Sauli Niinistö and Jenni Haukio of the Republic of Finland** | July 16, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbaf402b9a14118f88cb60e979c5250be4cb5231fd4b7cef8a4a2daa16f8ee9e938ff59fc4fbbbaa68cd35c0bb82f2779632d1bbbc9ef640) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbaf402b9a14118f5ee2b526d6c76cb1318da866998beed392e67aa46f0ebbb4d73f16c2e828ad9422fb4352fa84d3a63f152806520d2766) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d44fd1c3bcba33887f73c35ac10fd299bdd85de3a4524e7afd548143a3fbb7c5d98cfcf0dea1dd2cf2439f15362c936501bac57e5d7e6aecf3)

Eighteen of Judge Kavanaugh’s female law clerks , 26 state Attorneys General, and more than 160 members of the Yale University community have signed letters praising his unsurpassed qualifications for a seat on the Court. “In our view, the Judge has been one of the strongest advocates in the federal judiciary for women lawyers,” his former clerks wrote. “I look for the best,” Judge Kavanaugh said at the White House last week. “We are proud that so many of those hires have been talented women.” The letter from a majority of our Nation’s state Attorneys General sums up the case for Judge Kavanaugh clearly and concisely: “Throughout his career, Judge Kavanaugh has demonstrated an abiding commitment to the principles and freedoms on which our country was founded, and an unshakable respect for the proper role of the courts within our constitutional structure.” More : | Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump with President Sauli Niinistö and Jenni Haukio of the Republic of Finland | July 16, 2018 | |

It's hard to believe that Election Day is TOMORROW! Don't forget to get out and exercise your right to vote. I would be grateful to have your support at the polls.

I wanted to take a minute to update you on the endorsements my campaign for reelection in AL-02 has received. I hope you'll share this list with your friends and family, too!

I am honored and thankful to be endorsed by:

\- President Donald Trump
\- Vice President Mike Pence
\- The Alabama Farmers Federation (ALFA)
\- The Alabama Association of General Contractors
\- Alabama Republican Assembly
\- Alabama Retail Association
\- The U.S. Chamber of Commerce
\- Susan B. Anthony List
\- The National Rifle Association (NRA)
\- National Right to Life
\- Family Research Council
\- Congressman Mike Conaway (R-TX), Chairman of the House Agriculture Committee
\- Congressman Mac Thornberry (R-TX), Chairman of the House Armed Services Committee
\- National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB)

See you at the polls tomorrow! If you haven't already, you can find your polling location [here](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=117A138A9A3808).

Friend -- **Here’s what Richard has been up to the past week** : Last week Richard traveled around Northeastern Minnesota, visiting Duluth, Grand Marais, Ely, and International Falls to meet with voters and discuss important issues. **Duluth:** On Monday, Richard spent time in Duluth meeting with people to discuss a variety of issues. He was interviewed by the Duluth News Tribune to speak about his campaign, and also met with Charlie, a prominent Native American leader, to discuss policies important to the Native American community. **Grand Marais:** Richard conducted a town hall meet-and-greet session at the Cook County Community Center where he spoke and answered questions from voters. This session was followed with a second meet-and-greet at the Wunderbar Eatery and Glamp Ground to hear from citizens and engage with voters. **Ely:** On Tuesday, Richard had an interview with WTIP Community Radio discussing his candidacy to Northern Minnesota voters. He then met with Tuesday Group, a progressive organization in Ely to discuss the PolyMet copper-nickel mine project and its ramifications on the the Boundary Waters and Lake Superior. The mine will gravely pollute these treasured waters and cause significant environmental damage. Richard continued discussing the disastrous copper-nickel mine with Sustainable Ely’s campaign to Save the Boundary Waters. He met with voters at the Ely Folk School to learn about the school’s crafts and skills business and discuss important issues to the community. Richard then met with local business people at the Piragis Northwoods Company, a rental company specializing in canoes and other outdoor equipment. The owner, Steve Piragis gave Richard and his team a tour of the company’s solar panels and discussed the importance of sustainable energy. **International Falls:** On Wednesday, Richard hosted a meet and greet at Coffee Landing followed by a tour of the surrounding area of International Falls. In addition, he met with park rangers and local environmental advocates of the Voyageurs National Park to discuss the importance of environmental preservation of the area. Following his tour of the National Park, Richard met with voters for a Pint with Painter at the Crescent Bar and Grille where he conducted a town hall meeting and answered a variety of questions. He held an additional Q&A segment with the Northern Progressives, a group that focuses on bringing constituents and candidates together to discuss issues and educate voters.

We are marching towards Washington, and we are getting there one community at a time! Can you help us out? We can fight for our environment here at home.

Is it hot where you are? Did the Ellicott City floods (for the second consecutive year, mind you) affect your home, or your loved ones? Are you worried that they're doing nothing -- nothing -- just down the street in D.C. to address our obvious environmental crisis? I know I am. Ben's plan for climate justice in Maryland is simple, and it will work.
As a life-long environmentalist, Ben knows that protecting our planet is not just a moral imperative, it's an economic opportunity. As governor, he'll expand the use of renewable power and create good-paying jobs in the process.
For too long, Republicans have tied environmentalism to hurting working-class Americans and our economy. It's just not true, and Ben knows it: Protecting our environment means building our economy, and Maryland can be a leader in this country by promoting both.
Blue crabs can't thrive in a polluted bay. If we care about what Maryland is made of, it's time to make bold strides to protect it.

name: R. Jai Gillum
subject: Andrew's birthday is coming up
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37f4/9e00690/594dfbb8/2402cf5e/2976185344/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180716_AGBday_engg_gq_act__RJai_ettx&source=em18_180716_AGBday_engg_gq_act__RJai_ettx")
Friends,

Andrew is turning 39 soon -- and with the year we've had, it's a good opportunity to take a moment and celebrate all of the work he's done throughout his life.

From our marriage and our family to his work as Mayor of Tallahassee and this campaign, Andrew always puts his full heart and mind into what he does.

So before his birthday on July 26th, I'm working with his team to put together a card to wish him a happy birthday and would love to have all of his supporters that made this campaign possible on it too.

**[Will you join me by taking a moment to sign the birthday card?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37f4/9e00690/594dfbb8/2402cf51/2976185344/VEsE/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/sign-andrew-s-birthday-card?gpsid=13_55_2062&source=em18_180716_AGBday_engg_gq_act__RJai_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180716_AGBday_engg_gq_act__RJai_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+join+me+by+taking+a+moment+to+s")**

A lot has changed during the past year with the campaign, but Andrew's birthday will give us a chance to take look back at the last year, see how far we've come, and spend the day together as a family.

Andrew is deeply motivated because he knows you're counting on him to win, so we can rebuild our state into one that works for all of us. And hearing from supporters like you for his birthday will really help him keep the momentum going through August.

**[Friends, I can't wait to watch my husband open the card with all the signatures and messages from people like you -- please add your name and wish Andrew a happy birthday.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37f4/9e00690/594dfbb8/2402cf50/2976185344/VEsF/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/sign-andrew-s-birthday-card?gpsid=13_55_2062&source=em18_180716_AGBday_engg_gq_act__RJai_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180716_AGBday_engg_gq_act__RJai_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+FIRSTNAMEFriends+I+cant+wait+to+watch+my")**

Thank you,

R. Jai Gillum

name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Campaign Update: Hawley’s failing campaign, guns, livestream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, We are only a few short weeks away from the primary! While the momentum is still in our favor, we have a lot of work left to do. Thank you so much for everything you have done for the campaign so far. WE STILL NEED PHONBANKERS! You can do this from anywhere. We have an excellent training program for phone bankers, so please, sign up now! If you would like to make some calls before the primary, [**please click here to volunteer >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/volunteer?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=071618_update&n=1) Thanks, Friend. Here the campaign update: **Campaign Events:** This past week was packed full of campaign events. Austin attended two ice cream socials in Jackson and Franklin county, we door knocked in St. Louis, and also had the pleasure of seeing Vice President Mike Pence in Kansas City. We managed to grab some media attention and spoke with a few new supporters as well. **The Second Amendment:** Austin and Kyle Kashuv (Parkland school shooting survivor and Second Amendment activist) co-authored a piece in the Daily Wire about the Second Amendment. Austin is a strong advocate on our second Amendment rights and has called on conservatives to stop playing defense on our gun rights. He’s also exposed Josh Hawley as a gun grabber and a fake conservative. Hawley has openly called for more restrictions of the Second Amendment. [Here is a small excerpt from the article:](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailywire.com%2Fnews%2F32842%2Fpetersen-kashuv-freedom-liberty-and-2a-austin-petersen%3Famp%26__twitter_impression%3Dtrue&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=071618_update&n=2)
_Recently, retired Justice Stevens wrote an op-ed calling for the repeal of the Second Amendment. Moved by demonstrations in Washington and other major cities, he went on to say "But the demonstrators should seek more effective and more lasting reform. They should demand a repeal of the Second Amendment."_ _We appreciate his honesty. 3. A Super PAC supporting Renacci reportedly engaged in some of the "shadiest" practices ever -- and that's saying a lot.

4. It's not just the special interests coming after Sherrod. Renacci is running TV attack ads, too.

5. President Trump & Vice President Pence have personally come to Ohio to support Renacci.

6. Renacci **raised $2 million** in the second quarter of the year, and that doesn't include all the self-funding he can do.

7. Sherrod's been under attack since February of 2017 -- and we have four months of attacks to come.

9. **We're only 113 DAYS from Election Day.** That's not a whole lot of time to turn things around, and with so much at stake this year, we can't afford to lose Sherrod's voice in the Senate.

10. [**It's scary you haven't made your first contribution yet. Can you do it now?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d4/4462dc26/54a026bd/200787cc/11120289/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE2em5kIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180716znd?refcode=sbe180716znd_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

11. In a post-Citizens United world, we don't know how much special interest cash will find its way to Ohio. Back in 2012, it was over $40 million.

12. **Missing goals is scary.** When we miss goals, it means we can't afford all the resources we need to win. Which leads to our last, scariest update of all...

13. **We didn't hit our mid-month goal last night. We have to make up for lost ground, and _fast_. **

Halfway through the month, we should be halfway to our July goal. That means we need to be at $337,500 by the end of today -- and we're not even close to that yet. So if you can, [**rush in a contribution of $13 to help us reach this goal before midnight tonight.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d4/4462dc26/54a026bd/200787cc/11120289/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE2em5kIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180716znd?refcode=sbe180716znd_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thanks! Team Sherrod

subject: Barbarous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Trump is using children to come across as tough. Add your name now.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7892b/2f5ea88d/779f5141/2cbc0f25/3844664135/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema") | _"It has been a diabolical scheme. The President [is] playing chess, you know, he's...been willing to sacrifice a few pawns, which are these children, in his effort to look as tough as he wants to be."_

\-- Governor Jay Inslee, CNN, July 9, 2018 | [REUNITE FAMILIES NOW!](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7892b/2f5ea88d/779f5141/2cbc0f25/3844664135/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema")
---
Friend,
President Trump is playing a cruel political game of chess with the lives of children separated from their parents at the border.
_Thousands of children are still being kept apart from their families._ By dragging his feet to prevent children and their families from being quickly reunited, the president is using these children to prop up his fragile ego and look tough on immigration.
It's been a barbarous process from the get go. The Trump administration's callous indifference to the plight of the thousands of children placed in detention centers around the country, far removed from mothers and fathers, is outrageous.
But while millions of concerned Americans and the international community are pressing for action, Donald Trump's only interest is coming across as hard-headed.
[**We can't let this go, friend. As Donald Trump tries to distract us from his diabolical scheme, we must raise our voices now more than ever. Demand the Trump administration reunite families now. Add your name here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7892b/2f5ea88d/779f5141/2cbc0f25/3844664135/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema")
As governor, I'm demanding answers from Health and Human Services and Homeland Security about the children in custody.
The response to my requests? Practically radio silence. _It's clear the Trump administration has no idea what it's doing._ They have no working system in place to bring families back together. Instead, the federal agency cop out is claiming placing detained children in foster homes is _equivalent_ to reuniting them with their parents. Can you imagine if you were the parent of one of these children?
It's shameful. It's cruel. And it's unacceptable.
[**Friend, we cannot allow this travesty of human decency to continue. Demand the Trump administration reunite families now. Sign on here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7892b/2f5ea88d/779f5141/2cbc0f25/3844664135/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[REUNITE FAMILIES NOW!](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7892b/2f5ea88d/779f5141/2cbc0f25/3844664135/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema")

name: Michael Soliman, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: Slick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Bob Hugin may think he is slick by ducking questions about Donald Trump's nomination of Brett Kavanaugh, but we already know his answer.

Hugin enthusiastically supported Trump's first Supreme Court pick, Neil Gorsuch, and I think it's safe to say that he is excited about Kavanaugh, too.

Whether it is Kavanaugh's excitement about overturning the Affordable Care Act that has covered more than one million New Jerseyans or his belief that presidents shouldn't be questioned or charged in criminal cases while in office, Hugin knows that Kavanaugh's beliefs will benefit his good friend, Donald Trump.

[**The stakes have never been higher for all of us. That's why we need to keep Bob Menendez in the Senate to stop these attacks. You can help by chipping in $5 for the next four months until Election Day. Contribute today >>>**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c97/3af3c5d/3b8cd7d1/4ec38ff3/1360014577/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_recurring?gpsid=5_73_2064&refcode=em18_180716_Recur_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180716_Recur_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&recurring=1")

While Bob Hugin and Republicans continue their attempts to gut healthcare protections and throw affordable health care coverage into turmoil, Bob Menendez is fighting every day to ensure New Jersey families have the coverage they need.

Hugin can continue this game of cat and mouse for now, but sooner or later, the people of New Jersey deserve to know the truth -- Bob Hugin will always put Donald Trump, and his own bank account, over the people of our state.

[**There is so much at stake right now. We need your help. Commit to a monthly donation of $5 or more today and help Bob Menendez stop Hugin and Trump's attacks on healthcare.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c97/3af3c5d/3b8cd7d1/4ec38ff2/1360014577/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_recurring?gpsid=5_73_2064&refcode=em18_180716_Recur_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180716_Recur_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&recurring=1%22&recurring=4")

Thank you,

Michael

Bob Menendez for Senate

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Monday, July 16, 2018
## **J.D. Scholten Continues Fundraising Dominance Over Steve King— Outraises King for Third Consecutive Quarter**
King’s Corporate PAC Support Can’t Keep Pace With Scholten’s Grassroots Movement
Sioux City, IA - J.D. Scholten, Democratic candidate for the U.S. House in Iowa's 4th Congressional District, today reported an impressive second quarter fundraising total of over $330.000 more than double Steve King’s quarterly total of less than $141,000. **Over the last three quarters, Scholten has posted a significant fundraising advantage of more than two-to-one: $719,000 - $353,000.**
Highlights from the FEC reports posted today:
* Scholten’s average gift size to date is $18.44.
* Thirty percent of the money reported by Steve King’s comes from Corporate PACs, while Scholten has refused to take any corporate PAC money.
* Scholten has outraised King for the entire campaign cycle $756,000 - $511,781.
* For the third consecutive quarter, Scholten has received a donation from each of the 39 counties in the district, as well as all 50 states.

Scholten’s comments on the campaign’s latest FEC report:
I couldn’t be more thankful for the incredible support our campaign has received. As a first-time candidate, competing against an eight-term incumbent who receives so much of his money from corporate PACs is not easy. I’m incredibly proud that our people-powered movement is fueled by grassroots support, as **we’ve received donations now from over 11,000 individual donors! **
After putting 35,000 miles and traveling to all 39 counties in my personal vehicle, then traveling to all 39 counties in Sioux City Sue (our used Winnebago RV), and now significantly outraising Steve King for a third consecutive quarter, we’re proving that my campaign is not happy with just putting on a uniform. **We came to compete. We came to win.**
**###**

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
July 16, 2018
Contact: Press@johnkasich.com

Following President Trump's meeting and press conference with Russian President Putin, Gov. John Kasich issued the following statement:

_"The President’s appearance with Putin was not in America’s best interest. Simply put, President Trump is wrong. Putin’s words should never be given equal weight of our own Director of National Intelligence. Putin is a KGB operative trying to undermine the West and supporting other murderous dictators. He cannot and should not be trusted. Other American leaders, in both parties, should speak with one voice and let the world know we are not on the side of Russia."_

[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48a7/d0ce7de/513eccbe/9cd3ab9/818934209/VEsH/ "http://www.mollykelly.com")
[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48a7/d0ce7de/513eccbe/9cd3ab9/818934209/VEsE/ "http://www.mollykelly.com")
Dear friends,
Chris Sununu just signed _another_ bill that will make voting harder.
Sununu stalled for weeks and even sent this bill, HB 1264, to the New Hampshire Supreme Court for review. But just because a bill is constitutional doesn't make it right for our state.
And this bill is absolutely _wrong_ for New Hampshire.
Sununu has violated voters' trust, and we must replace him in November. **[Can you help our campaign hold Sununu accountable by contributing $5 right now?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48a7/d0ce7de/513eccbe/9cd3ab8/818934209/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrODEtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk81-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
This isn't the first time Sununu has made voting more difficult. Last year, he signed SB 3, a trumped-up solution to a problem - voter fraud - that doesn't exist.
Not only is voter disenfranchisement wrong, but it makes meeting one of our state's challenges - keeping our young people here - even more difficult. It's no surprise that a recent study found that young people are leaving New Hampshire and citing "unfriendly public policies" as a reason for saying goodbye to the Granite State. We cannot accept this.
As governor, I will repeal both of these harmful laws. I will also expand voting rights in New Hampshire. Too many have given their lives for the right to vote. We cannot go backward.
**[Can you chip in $5 to support our campaign and stand up for voting rights?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48a7/d0ce7de/513eccbe/9cd3ab8/818934209/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrODEtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk81-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,
Molly

Derek --

Earlier today -- just days after his very own Justice Department indicted 12 Russian intelligence agents for interfering in our democracy -- Donald Trump stood next to Russian President Vladimir Putin and took Putin's side over America's. Instead of denouncing Russia's attack on our democracy, he went after American institutions.

It's easy to get desensitized to the horror of Donald Trump, but this was truly a shocking moment, Derek. Never before has a U.S. president failed so spectacularly to stand up to a hostile foreign power.

**Now more than ever, we need a Congress that is prepared to defend our democracy and hold this president accountable. Contribute $3 right now to elect Democrats across the country to Congress this November. We must establish a check and balance on Trump, and we must do it now.**

American officials told Trump who set fire to our democracy, and instead of believing them, he invited the arsonist to investigate. Republican leaders have a choice: They can either hold this president accountable for his disgrace to our democracy, or stand with him and send a crystal-clear message that it's fine for a foreign power to attack Americans as long as it serves their political interests. subject: [Flip the Senate] The right to access abortion is on the line

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c64/24c69fd9/18020b80d/18827e9f/3507195403/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES36N_digital_email_20180716_SCOTUSPick_inact&source=WQEFES36N_digital_email_20180716_SCOTUSPick_inact")

Peter,

Make no mistake about it:

Brett Kavanaugh -- Trump's Supreme Court nominee -- is anti-choice.

Trump promised to appoint justices who would overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , and he's kept that promise by nominating Kavanaugh, whose judicial record includes anti-choice and anti-birth control opinions.

If he's confirmed, the Supreme Court could overturn _Roe_ and endanger abortion access in this country.

We can't let that happen.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to flip the Senate and give Democrats approval over Trump's nominees.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c64/24c69fd9/18020b80d/18827e98/3507195403/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180716_email_SCOTUSPick?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFES36N_digital_email_20180716_SCOTUSPick_inact&source=WQEFES36N_digital_email_20180716_SCOTUSPick_inact")**

Kavanaugh has been a judge on the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals for the past 12 years and has already made it crystal clear he's an enemy of reproductive freedom.

Do you remember last year when a young undocumented woman in U.S. custody at the border needed access to an abortion?

Brett Kavanaugh helped issue a block to keep the teenager from getting an abortion and dissented when the block was reversed. In his dissent, he wrote that "the government has permissible interests in favoring fetal life, protecting the best interests of a minor, and refraining from facilitating abortion."

In 2015, he wrote a dissenting opinion in a case about the Obamacare birth control benefit, arguing that it "substantially burden[s]" religious organizations.

He cannot be trusted to uphold _Roe_. The right to access safe, legal abortion is on the line.

We have to fight back by making sure Democrats flip the Senate.

**Donate $3 to help elect our 12 women running for the Senate and protect choice:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Fight-Back-Flip-Senate](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c64/24c69fd9/18020b80d/18827e99/3507195403/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180716_email_SCOTUSPick?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFightBackFlipSen&utm_campaign=WQEFES36N_digital_email_20180716_SCOTUSPick_inact&source=WQEFES36N_digital_email_20180716_SCOTUSPick_inact")**

Thanks,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

Friend, Did you get my message earlier last week about Judge Kavanaugh? If you can believe it, the left has gone even MORE off the rails, promising to defeat President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee. Chuck Schumer is making the calls, and Tammy Baldwin is following suit saying she’ll vote ‘no’ without even meeting with Judge Kavanaugh. Together, they are working hard with far-left activists to actively obstruct YOUR nominee to the Supreme Court. When Wisconsinites voted for President Trump, they voted for strong, conservative judicial appointments. Tammy Baldwin’s opposition to Judge Kavanaugh directly contradicts the will of the people. We deserve better. Please, read my note below and sign my petition to demand a swift confirmation for Judge Kavanaugh: -Leah \--------forwarded message below-------- Friend, If you needed another reason to make sure we win in November, President Trump gave it to us last night when he nominated Judge Kavanaugh to replace Justice Kennedy on the Supreme Court. As you saw... The liberals LOST it. Now, they are promising to do everything they can to prevent the confirmation of Judge Kavanaugh! Friend, these obstructionist tactics from liberals are just ridiculous. Americans voted for President Trump in 2016 knowing – and hoping – that he would have the opportunity to appoint MANY conservative justices. By obstructing the confirmation process, liberals are trying to stop the American people AGAIN. Politicians like Tammy Baldwin won’t take on their party leaders and stand up for you, for your rights, and YOUR Supreme Court nominee. But Friend, I always will. In the Senate, I will always fight to confirm the best people for all of the open positions in the administration, and I will vote to confirm President Trump’s nominees so we can get things DONE for America. But if liberals like Tammy win in November... we’ll only have to deal with more obstructionists preventing President Trump’s success. We can’t let that happen. We have to make sure we win in November. And right now, we need to make sure Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed: Americans deserve action – not obstruction. Let’s get Judge Kavanaugh confirmed to our Supreme Court now and put an end to these unfair blocks from the liberal elites. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

There is _nothing_ more important for Democrats this year than taking back the Senate majority - and the only way we can do that is by winning here in Nevada.
**But team, we received news that Jacky is basically tied with Dean Heller. If Jacky wins, Nevada wins.**
A Mitch McConnell-backed super PAC is promising to spend at least $11.2 million to help Republicans keep this seat - and the Senate majority. The future of our country is riding on you.
If Jacky loses this fall, Senate Republicans will have free rein to defund Planned Parenthood, attack Americans' health care and send more anti-everything ultraconservatives to the Supreme Court.
